title: Wrocław、Lower Silesian — 生活費、住宅、移住ガイド [2026]
description: Wrocław、Lower Silesianの完全ガイド：生活費、住宅価格、近隣地域、リモートワークの準備、移住のヒント。
content:
概要

WrocławはLower Silesianにある人口674,132の都市です。A beautiful city on the Oder River, known for its stunning Market Square, numerous bridges, colorful tenement houses, and a thriving tech and startup ecosystem.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
